resources.string: Connect widget to a markdown file
Pick one markdown file from your Obsidian vault. This widget instance will watch that file only.
Add a home-screen widget for an Obsidian markdown checklist. Each widget instance can point at a different file.
Use the button above or add the widget from the launcher.
Widget pin request sent. Finish setup in the launcher picker.
Launcher widget pinning is not available here. Add the widget manually from the home screen.
Unable to load the markdown checklist.
Unable to update the markdown file.
